name: sensor-anxiety-detection-sample
title: Sensor — Biometric Sensor Sample Dataset
description: Sample multimodal physiological and psychometric recordings from a single consenting participant (see DATA_ETHICS.md). Machine-readable schema for the CSVs in data/. Full prose reference: data/DATA_DICTIONARY.md.

fields.name: reltime
fields.description: Seconds since recording start.

fields.name: datetime
fields.description: Timestamp (string; sensor files use 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS.fff', questionnaire files use ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS').

fields.name: iSensor
fields.description: Sensor index (0-5).

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Signal quality (1.0 valid, 0.0 no signal).

fields.name: heart_rate
fields.description: Heart rate in BPM (0 = no lock).

fields.name: reltime
fields.description: Seconds since recording start.

fields.name: datetime
fields.description: Timestamp (string; sensor files use 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS.fff', questionnaire files use ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS').

fields.name: iSensor
fields.description: Sensor index (0-5).

fields.name: ibi
fields.description: Inter-beat interval in ms (0 = init row; quantized, not true R-R).

fields.name: reltime
fields.description: Seconds since recording start.

fields.name: datetime
fields.description: Timestamp (string; sensor files use 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS.fff', questionnaire files use ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS').

fields.name: iSensor
fields.description: Eye-tracker sensor index (always 0).

fields.name: headPos.x

fields.description: Head position/rotation (not tracked in this setup; always 0).

fields.name: headRotQ
fields.description: Head position/rotation (not tracked in this setup; always 0).

fields.name: gazeSrc.x
fields.description: Gaze origin point in tracker coordinates.

fields.name: gazeSrc.y
fields.description: Gaze origin point in tracker coordinates.

fields.name: gazeSrc.z
fields.description: Gaze origin point in tracker coordinates.

fields.name: gazeDir.x
fields.description: Gaze direction unit-vector component.

fields.name: gazeDir.y
fields.description: Gaze direction unit-vector component.

fields.description: Gaze direction unit-vector component.

fields.name: gazeQ
fields.description: Gaze tracking quality (1.0 = best).

fields.name: leftEyeOpen

fields.description: Right eye openness quality.

fields.name: pupil
fields.description: Pupil diameter in mm (0 = tracking loss).

fields.name: pupilQ
fields.description: Pupil measurement quality.

fields.description: Fixation duration in seconds (populated only when fixation is true).

fields.description: Session identifier.

fields.description: Psychometric test.

fields.description: Timestamp (string; sensor files use 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS.fff', questionnaire files use ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS').

fields.name: End Time
fields.description: Timestamp (string; sensor files use 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS.fff', questionnaire files use ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS').

fields.name: Score
fields.description: Question score.

fields.name: Average Pupil Dilation
fields.description: Mean pupil diameter (mm) during the question.

fields.name: Average Left Blink Rate
fields.description: Left-eye blink rate (blinks/min); >400 likely artifact.

fields.name: Average Right Blink Rate
fields.description: Right-eye blink rate (blinks/min); >400 likely artifact.

fields.name: Pupil Dilation Increase
fields.description: Dilation increased vs baseline.

fields.name: Left Blink Rate Increase
fields.description: Left blink rate increased vs baseline.

fields.name: Right Blink Rate Increase
fields.description: Right blink rate increased vs baseline.

fields.description: Psychometric test.

fields.name: Question
fields.description: Full question text.

fields.description: Selected answer text.

fields.description: Question score.

fields.name: Time(s)
fields.description: Response time in seconds.

fields.description: Timestamp (string; sensor files use 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS.fff', questionnaire files use ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS').
